subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath manifested that which was sanctified above all knowledge, recognition and comprehension [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر ما کان مقدسا عن علم کلشیء و عرفان کلشیء و ادراک کلشیء
subcodes.subjects: @exhortations and counsels, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @praise and encouragement
